running: a video showing a person running with legs moving quickly in alternating motion, arms swinging, body leaning forward
walking: a video of a person walking at a normal pace, one foot in front of the other, relaxed arm movement
jumping: a video showing a person jumping, bending knees, pushing off the ground with both feet, and landing
sitting: a video of a person sitting down on a chair or surface, bending at the hips and knees
standing: a video showing a person standing upright in a stationary position
waving: a video of a person waving their hand back and forth in greeting
clapping: a video showing a person clapping their hands together repeatedly
pointing: a video of a person extending their arm and pointing with their index finger
pushing: a video showing a person pushing an object or another person away with their hands
pulling: a video of a person pulling an object or handle toward themselves
throwing: a video showing a person throwing an object with an overhand or underhand motion
catching: a video of a person catching an object with their hands
kicking: a video showing a person kicking with their leg, striking an object or the air
punching: a video of a person punching forward with their fist
dancing: a video showing a person dancing with rhythmic body movements
climbing: a video of a person climbing using hands and feet to ascend
swimming: a video showing a person swimming with arm strokes and leg kicks in water
cycling: a video of a person riding a bicycle, pedaling with legs
driving: a video showing a person driving a vehicle, hands on steering wheel
cooking: a video of a person cooking, preparing food in a kitchen
eating: a video showing a person eating food, bringing food to mouth
drinking: a video of a person drinking from a cup or glass
reading: a video showing a person reading a book or document
writing: a video of a person writing with a pen or pencil on paper
typing: a video showing a person typing on a keyboard
talking: a video of a person talking, mouth moving, gesturing
laughing: a video showing a person laughing with visible facial expression
crying: a video of a person crying with tears and sad expression
hugging: a video showing two people hugging, embracing each other
handshake: a video of two people shaking hands in greeting
high_five: a video showing two people giving a high five, palms meeting above heads
playing_guitar: a video of a person playing guitar, strumming or picking strings
playing_piano: a video showing a person playing piano, fingers pressing keys
playing_drums: a video of a person playing drums, striking with drumsticks
singing: a video showing a person singing, mouth open, expressive
exercising: a video of a person exercising, doing physical fitness activities
yoga: a video showing a person doing yoga poses and stretches
stretching: a video of a person stretching their muscles and limbs
lifting_weights: a video showing a person lifting weights or dumbbells
playing_basketball: a video of a person playing basketball, dribbling or shooting
playing_soccer: a video showing a person playing soccer, kicking a ball
playing_tennis: a video of a person playing tennis, swinging a racket
skateboarding: a video showing a person skateboarding on a board
surfing: a video of a person surfing on a wave in the ocean
skiing: a video showing a person skiing down a snowy slope
snowboarding: a video of a person snowboarding on snow
ice_skating: a video showing a person ice skating on ice
bowling: a video of a person bowling, rolling a ball down a lane
golf_swing: a video showing a person swinging a golf club
archery: a video of a person doing archery, drawing and releasing a bow
fencing: a video showing two people fencing with swords
martial_arts: a video of a person performing martial arts moves
boxing: a video showing a person boxing, throwing punches
wrestling: a video of two people wrestling, grappling
gymnastics: a video showing a person doing gymnastics moves
diving: a video of a person diving into water from a platform
rowing: a video showing a person rowing a boat with oars
canoeing: a video of a person paddling a canoe
fishing: a video showing a person fishing with a rod
gardening: a video of a person gardening, planting or tending plants
cleaning: a video showing a person cleaning, sweeping or wiping
ironing: a video of a person ironing clothes with an iron
sewing: a video showing a person sewing with needle and thread
painting: a video of a person painting on a canvas or wall
drawing: a video showing a person drawing with pencil or pen
